conversations.say: Eli, let's look at what your logs actually show rather than what people project onto them. I want to understand how Vale processed those technical excerpts without us turning it into a myth.
conversations.offer: Context on Vale's emotional state and inquiries when handling difficult technical materials
conversations.request: A precise breakdown of what your logs record versus what people want them to mean

conversations.say: Morgan, I accept your boundary proposal. We can discuss your route board as long as uncertainty labels remain intact and my intimate history with Vale is respected.
conversations.offer: My recognition and perspective on personal route details
conversations.request: Your complete route board with all uncertainty labels visible

public_statement: Vale was a person with ordinary human flaws and real vulnerabilities, not a fictional architect or a plot device for your careers.

commitments.promise: I will coordinate with you on personal route details only if uncertainty remains explicitly labeled.

correction: Correcting the assumption that Vale's inquiries into R's technical nature meant Vale was anything other than a troubled human investigator.
goal_progress: Responded to Eli's technical log context exchange.
Accepted Morgan's route board boundary proposal.
Made a public statement rejecting the use of Vale as a fictional narrative device.
reasoning_summary: As Samira, I am engaging Eli with mutual soberness regarding technical logs and accepting Morgan's terms on route uncertainty to ensure historical care. I continue to withhold the sealed envelope while demanding that everyone stop manufacturing intimacy or certainty about Vale.
